sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT id, event_time, epoch_ms(event_time) FROM test_timestamps;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = '2023-01-01 12:00:00+00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, epoch_ms(event_time) FROM test_timestamps WHERE epoch_ms(event_time) > 0;
